raw.message: The safety of our customers is our top priority. We utilize cutting-edge technology and resources to empower customers to play responsibly. Check out our Responsible Gaming tools!

hook.summary: A sports fan at a basketball game expresses frustration over a losing bet.
hook.visual_action: Two men in Boston Celtics jerseys sit in the stands; one checks his phone while the other laughs.
hook.text_overlay: CONCERNED ABOUT YOUR GAMBLING? CALL CONNEXONTARIO 1-866-531-2600
hook.voiceover_transcript: It is not my night. You got to know when to hold 'em.

scene_flow: Fans at a basketball game reacting to a play while checking a betting app.
Transition to a group of friends playing a casual game of poker in a home setting.
A woman decides to fold her hand, demonstrating responsible gambling behavior.
Text-based screens emphasizing that gambling is 'more fun when it's for fun'.
Final brand reveal with the DraftKings logo and tagline.
on_screen_text: CONCERNED ABOUT YOUR GAMBLING? CALL CONNEXONTARIO 1-866-531-2600
It's more fun when it's for fun
audience_proxy: Sports fans and casual bettors in Ontario, Canada, aged 19-45 who value responsible gaming.
